mapper.select: SELECT * FROM users ORDER BY id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (username, password_hash, display_name, role, skills_json, base_capacity, avg_performance, delay_history_score, status) VALUES (#{username}, #{passwordHash}, #{displayName}, #{role}, #{skillsJson}, #{baseCapacity}, #{avgPerformance}, #{delayHistoryScore}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET display_name = #{displayName}, role = #{role}, skills_json = #{skillsJson}, base_capacity = #{baseCapacity}, avg_performance = #{avgPerformance}, delay_history_score = #{delayHistoryScore}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET avg_performance = #{avgPerformance} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET delay_history_score = #{score} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE users SET password_hash = #{passwordHash} WHERE id = #{id}
